# Markdown to Survey (MTS)

> The survey layer for AI agents. Create interactive surveys from Markdown or JSON schema, collect responses from humans, and retrieve structured results via API or MCP.

## What is MTS?

MTS lets AI agents gather structured information from humans. An agent writes a survey in Markdown or JSON schema, calls the MTS API, gets a shareable URL, and later retrieves structured results.

## MCP Integration

Add to `~/.claude.json`:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "survey": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@mts/mcp-server"],
      "env": { "MTS_API_KEY": "mts_sk_your_key_here" }
    }
  }
}
```

Tools: `create_survey`, `get_results`, `list_surveys`, `close_survey`

## API Quick Start

Get an API key:

```bash
curl -X POST https://mts.vercel.app/api/keys \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name":"my agent"}'
```

Create a survey:

```bash
curl -X POST https://mts.vercel.app/api/surveys \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer mts_sk_..." \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"markdown":"# Feedback\n\n**Q1. Rate your experience?**\n\n[scale 1-5]"}'
```

## Question Types

- `choice` — single or multiple selection from a list
- `text` — free-form text response
- `scale` — numeric range like 1-5 or 0-10
- `matrix` — apply the same options across multiple rows

## Docs

- Full docs: https://mts.vercel.app/docs
- OpenAPI: https://mts.vercel.app/api/openapi.json
- Full AI index: https://mts.vercel.app/llms-full.txt
